themes.exampleQuote: They are made in house and are liege waffles. So, more chewy and sugary with bits of crunch at the edges.
The best ice cream in the city. They sell by the pint if you order ahead.
Waffle with chocolate ice cream and Nutella is the best.
Awesome neighborhood place to take the kids. Consistently great waffles!
A pretty nice amount of Nutella flavor — could always be stronger though.

notable_quote: We can pop in, grab a sugar waffle and eat it piping hot while walking — a great walking date stop on a cold day.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers fixate on the specific texture of the Liège waffle — chewy, sugary, crisp at the edges — and pair it against the house ice cream as a unified experience worth repeating; the only friction is a recurring wish that certain flavors, particularly Nutella, pushed harder.
quarter_narrative: Nearly seven million TikTok plays tagged to a business with no TikTok account of its own, no active Instagram, and an Instagram profile that isn't even set to business mode — that is Waffallonia's Spring 2026 in a sentence. Twenty-eight creators shot here this quarter, led by a single @katelynnsnuggle video that cleared two million plays, and the shop captured none of the downstream traffic those posts generated. Meanwhile, across the Pittsburgh Sweets family, Page's is running away with the Instagram momentum signal, the exact axis where Waffallonia is most exposed despite holding the dessert category's top rank. The #1 position is defensible — review sentiment and visual catalog are both above family median — but a business that generates this much creator attention without any owned channel to redirect it is one algorithm shift away from watching that attention dissolve.
tldr_read: Nearly 7M TikTok plays from other people's accounts, zero owned posts this quarter, and a dormant Instagram with no bio — Icons of the Burgh, #1 in Pittsburgh Dessert.
tldr_meaning: The review signal and creator reach confirm the rank; the owned social void means the business is entirely dependent on stranger goodwill to sustain the visibility that put it there.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Seven Million Plays, Zero Posts: Pittsburgh's Most Filmed Dessert Shop Isn't Watching

playbook.headline: Convert the Instagram account to business mode now
playbook.action: The current Instagram is a personal account with no bio — switching to a business profile unlocks analytics, contact buttons, and search categorization that 28 active creators currently have no destination to tag properly.

playbook.headline: Post one Liège waffle video per week
playbook.action: With 2.1M plays on a single third-party TikTok about homemade waffles, there is demonstrated demand for this specific product filmed in motion — owned short-form video of the waffle press closing or the sugar caramelizing is the most direct path to closing the gap with Page's on Instagram momentum.

playbook.headline: Add the pint pre-order detail to Google profile
playbook.action: One of the seven reviews specifically calls out pint pre-orders as a differentiator; that detail does not appear surfaced in the Google listing, and it is exactly the kind of high-intent conversion hook that distinguishes a visit from a purchase.
